electron/ipc-handlers.js.summary: Central IPC bridge — registers ~140 ipcMain.handle() endpoints that adapt Synapse's pre-existing server services (originally HTTP/SSE) to Electron's IPC.

electron/preload.js.summary: Context isolation bridge — runs in the renderer process before any web content loads and uses contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld to expose window.electronAPI with a strict surface area: a PUSH_CHANNELS whitelist (26 channels) that gates 'on'/'off' subscriptions f

electron/services/AutoUpdateService.js.summary: Wraps electron-updater into a single-state-machine service that powers the in-app auto-update UI.

electron/services/ClaudeCodeService.js.summary: Spawns and manages Claude Code CLI worker processes for swarm tasks.

electron/services/CodexService.js.summary: OpenAI Codex CLI counterpart to ClaudeCodeService — spawns codex worker processes for swarm tasks.

electron/services/CommandsService.js.summary: Filesystem CRUD layer over `_commands/` markdown files.

electron/services/ConversationService.js.summary: Persists chat conversations as JSON files in `{ROOT}/conversations/`.

electron/services/DebugService.js.summary: In-process Node.js debugger via the Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP).

electron/services/GuideService.js.summary: GuideService is the read-only Electron main-process loader for documentation/guide markdown.

electron/services/InstrumentService.js.summary: Implements the `!instrument` command: scans .jsx/.tsx/.html/.htm files in a target project and adds `data-synapse-label="<UUID>"` attributes to text-bearing elements (h1-h6, p, span, button, a, label, li, td, th, blockquote, dt, dd, plus a small set of common

electron/services/PreviewService.js.summary: Builds the reverse map for the Live Preview tab: scans a project's JSX/TSX/HTML files for `data-synapse-label="..."` attributes and produces `{ [label]: { file, line, text } }`.

electron/services/PreviewTextWriter.js.summary: The write side of Live Preview: when the user double-clicks and edits text in the Preview tab, this service finds the source file containing the matching `data-synapse-label` UUID and surgically replaces ONLY the text content while preserving JSX expressions,

electron/services/ProjectService.js.summary: Project detection, context loading, and CLI binary discovery.

electron/services/PromptBuilder.js.summary: Constructs the two prompts every worker receives: the system prompt (worker instructions + dispatch context) and the task prompt (task description + PKI knowledge + CLAUDE.md project context + read-only additional context dirs + upstream task results).

electron/services/SwarmOrchestrator.js.summary: The GUI swarm dispatch engine — the in-app replacement for a terminal-based master agent.

electron/services/TaskEditorService.js.summary: Backs the in-app Swarm Builder modal with CRUD operations on a dashboard's initialization.json: createSwarm (also resets logs.json + clears progress/), addTask, updateTask, removeTask (with depends_on cleanup + progress file deletion), addWave, removeWave (wit

electron/services/TerminalService.js.summary: Manages PTY-backed terminal sessions for the in-app Terminal tab and worker terminals.

electron/settings.js.summary: Persistent settings store backed by a single JSON file at {userData}/synapse-settings.json.

index.html.summary: Vite-served HTML entrypoint for the React renderer.

launch.sh.summary: Minimal POSIX launcher script intended to be double-clicked or executed from the Synapse repo root.

package.json.summary: npm package manifest and the operational entrypoint definition for Synapse.

README.md.summary: Public-facing repository README for onboarding users to Synapse, explaining installation, launch, command usage, major features, and best practices.

src/server/index.js.summary: HTTP server entry point that wires together SSEManager, DashboardService, WatcherService, QueueService, and apiRoutes into a single pure-Node `http` server (no framework).

src/server/routes/apiRoutes.js.summary: Single function `handleApiRoute(req, res, url)` containing every REST API endpoint handler for the dashboard server, dispatched as a sequential cascade of `if (url.pathname === ...

src/server/services/ArchiveService.js.summary: Manages archived dashboard snapshots in the top-level Archive/ directory.

src/server/services/DashboardService.js.summary: The canonical accessor layer for dashboard directory layout and on-disk state.

src/server/services/DependencyService.js.summary: Pure-computation service for dependency-aware dispatch readiness.

src/server/services/HistoryService.js.summary: Builds and persists post-swarm history summaries to the top-level history/ directory.

src/server/services/QueueService.js.summary: Read-only accessor for the queue/ overflow directory used by !master_plan_track when more swarms are planned than the active dashboard slots can hold.

src/server/services/WatcherService.js.summary: The reactive heart of the server.

src/server/SSEManager.js.summary: Manages the live set of Server-Sent Events client connections in a `Map<http.ServerResponse, {dashboardFilter}>` and exposes `broadcast`, `addClient`, `removeClient`, `startHeartbeat`, `stopHeartbeat`, and `closeAll` as the single public surface for fan-out.

src/server/utils/constants.js.summary: Defines all server-side named constants — directory paths resolved from the tracker root, polling/timing intervals tuned for fs.watch reliability, and shared default object shapes.

src/server/utils/json.js.summary: Hardened JSON I/O and schema validation utilities.

src/server/utils/validation.js.summary: Single-export `validateDependencyGraph(agents)` that performs four structural checks on a Synapse swarm's agent dependency graph and returns `{valid, errors, warnings}`.

src/ui/components/BottomPanel.jsx.summary: VS Code-style bottom panel with Terminal, Problems, Output, Debug Console, and Ports tabs.

src/ui/components/ChainPipeline.jsx.summary: Chain-row layout for swarms whose tasks form linear dependency chains.

src/ui/components/chat/ChatSidebar.jsx.summary: Left sidebar for the Chat tab.

src/ui/components/ConnectionIndicator.js.summary: Tiny one-dot indicator showing the SSE / IPC connection state.

src/ui/components/EmptyState.jsx.summary: Static placeholder section shown in the dashboard main area when no active task exists for the current dashboard.

src/ui/components/git/GitWelcome.jsx.summary: Empty-state landing card shown by GitManagerView when no repositories are open (gitRepos.length === 0).

src/ui/components/git/HistoryPanel.jsx.summary: Full commit-history view rendered in the Git Manager content area's History tab.

src/ui/components/git/InitFlow.jsx.summary: Wizard surface shown by GitManagerView when the active repo's folder exists but lacks a .git directory (api.gitIsRepo returned false).

src/ui/components/git/QuickActions.jsx.summary: Large-format one-click git operations bar, optimized for non-coders.

src/ui/components/git/RepoTabs.jsx.summary: Horizontal tab strip at the top of GitManagerView showing every open repository.

src/ui/components/git/SafetyDialogs.jsx.summary: Reusable confirmation-dialog primitives for destructive git operations.

src/ui/components/Header.jsx.summary: Top navigation bar of the app.

src/ui/components/HomeView.jsx.summary: Overview screen shown when no specific dashboard is selected.

src/ui/components/ide/CodeEditor.jsx.summary: Monaco Editor wrapper that owns the IDE's primary code surface.

src/ui/components/ide/DebugConsolePanel..summary: REPL-style debug console mounted in BottomPanel.

src/ui/components/ide/DebugPanels.jsx.summary: VS Code-style debug sidebar with four collapsible sections: Variables, Call Stack, Breakpoints, Watch Expressions.

src/ui/components/ide/DebugToolbar.jsx.summary: Pure presentational debug control bar — receives debugStatus + 8 callback props (onContinue, onPause, onStepOver, onStepInto, onStepOut, onRestart, onStop, onLaunch) from IDEView and renders standard debugger buttons with state-driven enable/disable.

src/ui/components/ide/EditorTabs.jsx.summary: Horizontal tab bar for the IDE editor area.

src/ui/components/ide/FileExplorer.jsx.summary: Recursive file-tree view rendered from state.ideFileTrees[workspaceId].

src/ui/components/ide/IDEWelcome.jsx.summary: Welcome screen rendered when ideWorkspaces is empty.

src/ui/components/ide/ProblemsPanel.jsx.summary: Aggregates state.diagnostics (Object<filePath, Array<{line,column,message,severity,source}>>) into a VS Code-style 'Problems' panel embedded in BottomPanel.

src/ui/components/ide/SearchResults.jsx.summary: Renders search results returned by SearchPanel.

src/ui/components/ide/WorkspaceTabs.jsx.summary: Top-of-IDE horizontal tab bar listing all open workspace folders with a '+' add button.

src/ui/components/LogPanel.jsx.summary: Collapsible log panel with filter buttons and bottom-anchored auto-scroll.

src/ui/components/MetricsPanel.jsx.summary: Collapsible panel showing post-swarm performance metrics fetched from GET /api/dashboards/:id/metrics.

src/ui/components/modals/AgentDetails.js.summary: Detailed view of a single swarm agent/task.

src/ui/components/modals/ArchiveModal.js.summary: Lists archived swarm snapshots from the {tracker_root}/Archive/ directory.

src/ui/components/modals/CommandsModal.j.summary: Browse, view, edit, add, and delete command markdown files across three scopes: Synapse built-in (read-only), Project-level _commands/ (read-only here), and User-level (full CRUD plus folder creation).

src/ui/components/modals/HistoryModal.js.summary: Lists past completed swarm runs sourced from {tracker_root}/history/*.json (via api.getHistory()) plus an optional analytics section computed by the !history --analytics command.

src/ui/components/modals/LogsModal.jsx.summary: Full-screen log viewer for a single dashboard's logs.json content.

src/ui/components/modals/Modal.jsx.summary: Base modal wrapper component used as the foundation for nearly all modal dialogs in the app.

src/ui/components/modals/PermissionModal.summary: Dual-mode permission popup for agent tool requests.

src/ui/components/modals/PlanningModal.j.summary: AI-powered task planner that decomposes a natural-language work request into a parallel task swarm structure (initialization.json shape: task, agents[], waves[], chains[], history[]).

src/ui/components/modals/SettingsModal.j.summary: Application-wide settings: theme picker (6 named themes + Custom), custom-color picker (bg/surface/text/accent/completed/error), App Configuration numeric inputs (dashboardCount, init/progress/reconcile poll timings), and Updates section (current version, late

src/ui/components/modals/TaskDetails.jsx.summary: Read-only metadata view for a swarm task (the top-level swarm record from initialization.json — distinct from per-agent details).

src/ui/components/modals/TaskEditorModal.summary: Form modal for creating or editing a single task (agent) inside the SwarmBuilder before the swarm is launched.

src/ui/components/modals/WorkerTerminal..summary: Live worker output viewer rendering the agent's tool-use stream as a Claude-style conversation.

src/ui/components/ModeMenu.jsx.summary: Hamburger-icon dropdown that switches the global appMode between 'chat' and 'code'.

src/ui/components/ProgressBar.jsx.summary: Thin horizontal fill bar showing completed/total ratio.

src/ui/components/QueuePopup.jsx.summary: Floating action button (FAB) with a badge showing queued task count.

src/ui/components/Sidebar.jsx.summary: The dashboard sidebar — primary navigation surface.

src/ui/components/StatsBar.jsx.summary: Six-card stat strip across the top of the dashboard view: Total, Completed, In Progress, Failed, Pending, Elapsed.

src/ui/components/SwarmBuilder.jsx.summary: Embedded swarm builder/editor view used to compose initialization.json before launching a swarm.

src/ui/components/TerminalView.jsx.summary: Interactive xterm.js terminal backed by a node-pty PTY in the Electron main process.

src/ui/components/WavePipeline.jsx.summary: Wave-column layout — the primary visualization for parallel swarms.

src/ui/context/AppContext.jsx.summary: Central global-state store for the entire dashboard.

src/ui/utils/dashboardProjects.js.summary: Per-dashboard project-path and per-dashboard additional-context-directory mappings persisted to localStorage with optional async sync to disk via window.electronAPI.saveAdditionalContext / getAdditionalContext.

src/ui/utils/ideWorkspaceManager.js.summary: Bridge between IDE workspaces (folders opened in the Code Explorer) and dedicated dashboards.

src/ui/utils/markdown.js.summary: Lightweight zero-dependency Markdown renderer specifically tuned for the subset Claude produces.

src/ui/utils/monacoWorkerSetup.js.summary: One-shot Monaco Editor web-worker bootstrap for Vite.

vite.config.js.summary: Vite build configuration for the React renderer.
